title: Doctrine migration: baseline retired, CI-owned full, registry-scoped dev loop — every teaching surface
action: Per CONTEXT D1+D6 + plan-check P1-2/P1-3/P1-1. Rewrite every surface teaching the retired doctrine in one cell: (1) AGENTS.block.md item 16 + merged root AGENTS.md (byte-parallel): baseline becomes 'before your first cells claim, check CI — latest full-verify run on the base branch (gh) plus any open verify-red issue; red => surface + fix-first cell; NO local full run: dev loop runs registry-scoped tests only (commands.test / run_verify --impacted), the full suite is CI-owned'. (2) inject.mjs BOTH twins preamble paragraph (~:448-451) says the same; P1-2: scripts/fixtures/preamble-golden.txt is a BYTE-FROZEN golden of this text (test_compact_capsule.mjs:36-52) — regenerate via node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs --update-golden and commit; update any other tests asserting the old text (grep, notably templates/tests/test_misc.mjs) — assertions updated, never weakened. (3) bee-hive SKILL.md ~:160. (4) bee-planning:122 + bee-executing:67 (fix four-site phrasing): cell verify authored FROM the registry (impact_registry --query / --impacted); full-run obligations collapse to CI-owned; merge gates on commands.test. (5) P1-3: skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md:125,129 wave-close 'full configured commands.verify chain exactly once' becomes the impacted run (commands.test) with CI owning the full pass — no local full-run mandate survives anywhere (grep-proof in report). (6) routing-and-contracts.md Verify Ladder ~:242 rewritten, naming decision e54878b1 superseded by ci-owned-verify D6. (7) knowledge R4 (suite-topology-and-discovery.md:72-79) rewritten + Behaviors bullet for --impacted/registry; bee knowledge index regen, knowledge check green. Then re-render mirrors (onboard_bee --apply + render_plugin_skill_trees), regenerate release manifest, and P1-1: impact_registry --write + commit (inject/bee closures changed).

truths: zero surfaces still teaching local-baseline or three-moment/Ladder rules (grep-proof in report)
inject twins identical; test assertions updated not weakened

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs && node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Doctrine migration complete: retired the baseline-run/three-moment/Verify-Ladder doctrine on every teaching surface (AGENTS twins, inject.mjs twins+golden, bee-hive/planning/executing/swarming SKILL.md, routing-and-contracts.md Verify Ladder, verify-pipeline knowledge R4+Behaviors bullet). Replacement: no local full run is ever a workflow obligation; before the first cells claim the session checks CI status (base-branch verify run + open verify-red issue) instead of running anything locally; the dev loop runs registry-scoped commands.test/--impacted; wave close and worktree merge run the impacted check instead of the full chain; the full commands.verify chain is CI-owned. Also fixed a doctrine-layer knowledge concept file and two onboarding notice strings the grep-proof surfaced as still teaching the retired doctrine (beyond the cell's literal files list, required by the cell's own grep-proof must-have).
